name: Vecinos Miami Beach
address: 3101 Indian Creek Drive, Miami Beach, FL 33140
description: A welcoming neighborhood all-day bar at Hotel Trouvail with a shareable menu drawn from the founders' travels and local roots, by nightlife veterans Joshua Wagner and Jake Jefferson with Caracas Bakery's Jesus Brazon.

name: True Loaf Bakery
description: A neighborhood bakery dedicated to crafting honest, high-quality breads and pastries since 2013, best known for naturally leavened sourdough, traditional baguettes, and croissants made with top-quality French butter.

name: Wholy Bagel - William Cannon
address: 4404 W William Cannon Dr, Austin, TX 78749
hours: Weekdays 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM, Weekends 7:00 AM - 2:00 PM
description: Wholy Bagel prepares authentic New York-style bagels baked fresh daily, recognized by USA Today, Epicurious and Fox News as one of the best bagels outside of New York.

name: Wholy Bagel - Far West
description: Wholy Bagel prepares authentic New York-style bagels baked fresh daily, recognized by USA Today, Epicurious and Fox News as one of the best bagels outside of New York.

name: Nervous Charlie's Bagels - North Lamar
address: 5501 N Lamar Blvd Ste B101, Austin, TX 78751
description: Nervous Charlie's makes straightforward, simple bagels alongside creative cream cheeses and sandwiches using only the best ingredients shipped directly from New York City and from Austin.

name: Nervous Charlie's Bagels - Cedar Park
address: 410 W Whitestone Blvd #300, Cedar Park, TX 78613
description: Nervous Charlie's makes straightforward, simple bagels alongside creative cream cheeses and sandwiches using only the best ingredients shipped directly from New York City and from Austin.

name: Rosen's Bagel Co - Burnet Road
address: 11101 Burnet Rd Ste A100, Austin, TX 78758
hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 2:00 PM, Sat-Sun 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM
description: Rosen's Bagel Co makes all their bagels in house with a 48-hour process, alongside artisanal schmears and locally roasted coffee.

name: Rosen's Bagel Co - Republic Square
hours: Mon-Fri 7:00 AM - 2:00 PM, Sat-Sun 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM
description: Rosen's Bagel Co makes all their bagels in house with a 48-hour process, alongside artisanal schmears and locally roasted coffee.

name: David Doughie's Bagelry
hours: Thu-Fri 7:00 AM - 1:00 PM, Sat-Sun 8:00 AM - 1:00 PM
description: Austin bagel trailer at Fleet Coffee serving fresh New York-style bagels made with locally sourced organic heirloom grains from Barton Springs Mill, hand-rolled and aged for three days, then boiled and baked.

name: Rockstar Bagels
description: Rockstar Bagels is a neighborhood bagel shop and wholesale production facility in East Austin founded in March 2009, boiling each bagel in 100% barley malt syrup and baking on bagel boards for a uniform, light bake.

name: Lighthouse (Miami)
_skip_reason: Cannot verify a Miami bakery/restaurant called 'Lighthouse'. Closest match is Lighthouse Cafe at Bill Baggs Cape Florida State Park in Key Biscayne, but unclear if that is what user meant. User's note 'from true loaf' suggests the verified venue is True Loaf (already included).
